headline: Dell, Weyerhaeuser, Visa: A Cross-Sector Look at Former Stock Picks
summary: Dell Technologies  was introduced by Jacob Sonenshine in October.  Weyerhaeuser  was covered by Andrew Bary in December.  Dell is showing relative strength in 2026, up 21% while the benchmark  is down 3%.
